description: Prepend the prefix '[EXT] ' to the First Name of all users in the "Contractors" group (Nadia Ivanova, Tomás Guerrero, and Olumide Adeyemi) and the prefix '[GUARD] ' to the First Name of all users in the "Security Staff" group (Victor Schulz, Tamara Kowalski, and Leon Fischer) in 2N Access Commander (https://localhost:9443, admin / 2n). Ensure that users in the "Employees", "Reception Team", and "IT Department" groups are not modified, and all other fields like Last Name and Email remain unchanged.
